title: CP0 Comes to Egghead
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, York, Unknown person #8, Pythagoras, Vegapunk, Saturn as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ah, you mean Momo?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a failed devil fruit that I left in punk hazard.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It seems that he ate it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hm? Really? It's a failed product?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's an artificial devil fruit that I created.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was created with a large number of research funds over 20 years from Kaido's Lineage Factor

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But his growth won't be the same as the original fruit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah! So that's why he can be turned into a dragon-like Kaidou!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it was a success! He can spit fire and he is powerful, even now he became a guardian deity for wano!!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: So you created it? You are incredible!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What's the color?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's pink.

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: You see!? It was a great failure!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I mean it still works though... I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see, so he is a genius and a perfectionist.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How about this robot?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please move it, aren't you the one who created it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No, that's wrong.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the legendary metal giant that attacked Mary Geoise 200 years ago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: 200 years ago?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also, that machine was probably created far more than 900 years ago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Eh? That's impossible!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I still don't know the reason for its creation.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard that there was no damage due to a lack of energy.

dialogue.speaker: Pythagoras
dialogue.text: The researchers at that time were surprised....

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: With unknown science it has.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one knows where it came from or what it was trying to do.

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: The world government ordered its complete destruction,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But because of their curiosity, the researchers didn't do that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It still exists here because the information of it has been passed down from generation to generation.

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: The government didn't know about its existence.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Women should

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys did well coming here. You must've seen the entrance as a wall, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Well I did go rough on it..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No! We just lost! We didn't go rough on it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Well I'm truly sorry for that experience.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 200 years ago... that year is the exact year,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: When discrimination against Fishmen started!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that robot climbed through the red line!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Probably...

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
